articles.title: Why Reddit blocked my daily visit to its mobile website - Ars Technica
articles.description: Reddit REALLY wants you to use its app.

articles.title: Xbox is giving achievement art an upgrade on Series X consoles - TrueAchievements
articles.description: Microsoft has rolled out an update to some Xbox Insiders that improves the sharpness of achievement art on Xbox Series X consoles.

articles.title: Our Daughter Overheard Some … Bombastic Noises While Staying at Our Friends’ House. Now She’s Traumatized. - Slate
articles.description: I'm not sure if I should tell them.

articles.title: Patch Notes 1.27.0 - ARC Raiders
articles.description: ARC Raiders is a multiplayer extraction adventure, set in a lethal future earth, ravaged by a mysterious mechanized threat known as ARC.

articles.title: Samsung can't stop leaking its upcoming foldables in One UI 9 - Android Authority
articles.description: We dug into Samsung's One UI 9 software and found images showing off the Wide Fold and Galaxy Z Fold 8 devices.

articles.title: Microsoft Edge Stores All Saved Passwords in Cleartext Process Memory at Launch - CyberSecurityNews
articles.description: A security researcher has discovered that Microsoft Edge decrypts every stored password into process memory the moment the browser launches and keeps them there as cleartext, regardless of whether the user ever visits those sites. The finding, disclosed on Ap…
